review: Our recent experience with Sara Thelen and Doug Foster of Foster Group/Keller Williams during our house-hunting process in the Bellingham/Birch Bay area was exceptional! Not long after our initial arrival in Birch Bay last spring, we met Doug and were introduced to his associate, Sara, as well. It did not take long for them to determine what we were looking for. They made us feel comfortable with the house-buying process in an unfamiliar area and were always patient as our requirements were narrowed down, and they were willing to show us many properties on a schedule that worked for us. During our house search, they connected us with a mortgage broker to get a loan pre-approval going and also introduced us to area residents who were previous clients. During our second visit to the area starting in late fall, we were able to hit the ground running and we found the right property for us in a very short time. Both Doug and Sara were always available to answer our questions and their combined knowledge helped make the entire house-buying and inspection process easy. After closing, the information they provided about needed service professionals, resources and retail shops really helped us to quickly become familiar with the Bellingham/Birch Bay area. We have referred another soon-to-relocate friend to Doug and Sara and would not hesitate to use their services again if the need arose. R and A
